titlestmt.titleproper: Central New York Regional Medical Program records3240
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Nancy Dean

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-05-04 18:24:28 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Central New York Regional Medical Program records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Central New York Regional Medical Program

did.abstract: Includes document files, financial materials, evaluation materials, committee minutes, proposals for funding from health programs and projects, project files, librarian files, historical files and grant applications of the Central New York Regional Medical Program.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Central New York Regional Medical Program was a project funded by the U.S. Department of Health, Education and Welfare. Its goals were to increase quality and access to health care, while moderating cost. Under the guidance of a Regional Advisory Group, it worked to foster cooperative efforts to improve health care and provide grants for innovative projects designed to meet its goals. The program was terminated in 1976.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes document files, financial materials, evaluation materials, committee minutes, proposals for funding from health programs and projects, project files, librarian files, historical files and grant applications of the Central New York Regional Medical Program.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Central New York Regional Medical Program records, #3240. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

unittitle.extref: Link to the finding aid, PDF file.

did.unittitle: Series I. Continuing Education in Nursing Program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains all the files and background material which was needed to run Project #1 Continuing Education in Nursing. These materials were formerly located in the Nursing Office at State University Hospital, Upstate Medical Center, Syracuse, New York.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: At the request of HEW the Health Policy Analysis and Accountability Network, Inc. (HPAAN) (formerly Public Accountability Reporting - PAR), 1104 North Cole Road, Boise, Idaho 83704 (208) 376-9900 collected from 53 RMPs throughout the country - locally generated documents describing procedures, processes and projects. For an overview of the documents in this collection see table of contents in Box 7.
